steps.title: Choose two points on the line
steps.content: Use two readable points on the line of best fit, not necessarily two data points. The line passes near $(0,8)$ and $(10,1)$.

steps.title: Compute the slope
steps.content:
Use change in $y$ over change in $x$.
$$\frac{1-8}{10-0}=\frac{-7}{10}=-0.7$$

steps.title: Use sign and size
steps.content: The line slopes downward, so the slope must be negative. A drop of about $7$ units over a run of $10$ units is closest to $-0.7$. The answer is C.
